title: PlannerPlan
description: Represents a plan in Microsoft 365. A plan is owned by a group and contains a collection of plannerTasks. It can also have a collection of plannerBuckets.

@odata.etag.description: The ETag of the resource, used for concurrency control

id.description: The unique identifier for the plan. 28 characters long and case-sensitive.

owner.description: Deprecated. Use the container property instead. ID of the group that owns the plan.

createdDateTime.description: The date and time at which the plan was created. ISO 8601 format, always in UTC.
